summary.lv: Capital, pilna servisa IT uzņēmums Rīgā ar 30+ gadu pieredzi un 70+ darbiniekiem (partneris Dell, Apple, Lenovo, Microsoft, MikroTik), meklē Zoho risinājumu arhitektu Ganību dambja birojam.
summary.en: Capital — a full-service Riga IT company with 30+ years of experience, 70+ staff and partnerships with Dell, Apple, Lenovo, Microsoft and MikroTik — is hiring a Zoho Solutions Architect for its Ganību dambis office.
